title: Adding more than one activity Board in a workspace and connecting them
excerpt: As of right now you can only have one activity board in a workspace regardless if tasks are completely different. I want the ability to make more than one activity board and then when creating an activity, be able to cho…

posts.author: Amanda_11 (Amanda Gaydos)
posts.cookedHtml:
As of right now you can only have one activity board in a workspace regardless if tasks are completely different. I want the ability to make more than one activity board and then when creating an activity, be able to choose which activity board to choose.

In addition to the activity board itself, the activities are not connected to the original item and therefore any notes written under an activity is not logged in the original item. We have a lot of follow ups in the way we use Monday and it’s frustrating having to see the activity and then go and look up the original item in a different board just to record notes so that everyone in the workspace can see. I would like to see that when an activity is created, you can click into the activity and brings you into the original account where the activity originated.
